name: Personal Locker
description: Your personal locker with twin sliding doors, built into the far wall.
open_description: The locker doors slide open smoothly, revealing racks for clothing and several shelves.

description: A medium sized locker with metal doors, attached to the wall.

name: Small Cabinet
